Assortment.description: Definition of the List of Product for a store

BurnRule.description: Rules for burning loyalty points into rewards, discounts, or gift products.

BusinessPartner.description: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc

InvoiceLineProductBundleItem.description: Information about the bundle items added to the invoice line's product.

Product.description: The Product entity represents all items managed within organizational processes and activities, including products for sale, raw materials, services, and resources.

ProductBundle.description: Mapping of the product bundle entity for export via the Business API.

ProductCategory.description: Product Category is an entity that groups together different products with the aim of helping in their management and analysis.

ProductListsForLabels.description: Endpoint for getting information of the Product Lists for Labels entity in Openbravo

ProductPrice.description: List of the Prices of the Products

ProductSubtype.description: Product Subtype allows for more specificity in Product Type configuration.

Promotion.description: Entity that describes the discounts and promotions that allow to adjust prices based on different rules.

ReturnReason.description: Information about the return reasons when returning goods to the vendor or from the customer.

User.description: User that has access to the system
